original_snippet_context: An article discussing the Convênio de Taubaté and its impact on Brazilian finances.  The author criticizes the agreement and its proposed Caixa de Conversão.
relevant_quote: Eis que apparece a panacéa de Taubaté com sua caixa de conversão a emitir mais papel e a reconverter o papel emittido por taxa prefixada, graças aos milhões esterlinos levantados sob fiança do governo!
justification: The author criticizes the Caixa de Conversão proposed by the Convênio de Taubaté as a scheme to issue more paper money and reconvert it at a fixed rate, financed by loans. This aligns with orthodox concerns about excessive paper money and maintaining the gold standard.
